Developer Tools.name: The Platform Engineer
Developer Tools.archetype: Senior IC at a growth-stage startup
Developer Tools.description: Builds and maintains the internal developer platform. Lives in terminals. Evaluates Claude on whether it saves keystrokes, not whether it's impressive.
Developer Tools.uses_skills_for: SDK integration, API scaffolding, CLI tooling, keeping up with framework changes without reading docs
Developer Tools.quote: If I have to explain it to a junior, I'd rather just automate it.
Developer Tools.unmet_need: Skill versioning and dependency management — they need package.json for skills

Frontend & Design.name: The Design Engineer
Frontend & Design.archetype: Full-stack engineer with strong visual instincts
Frontend & Design.description: Sits at the seam between design and engineering. Cares deeply about craft. Uses Claude to close the gap between what designers spec and what engineers ship.
Frontend & Design.uses_skills_for: Component generation, design system enforcement, accessibility audits, CSS that actually works
Frontend & Design.quote: The handoff is where good design goes to die. Claude is my translator.
Frontend & Design.unmet_need: No skill for design token management or cross-platform consistency checking

Security & Auth.name: The Security Practitioner
Security & Auth.archetype: AppSec engineer or indie security researcher
Security & Auth.description: Treats every codebase as hostile until proven otherwise. Uses Claude for the tedious parts of security work — the pattern matching, the boilerplate auditing — while reserving judgment for themselves.
Security & Auth.uses_skills_for: Vulnerability scanning, auth flow review, smart contract auditing, secret detection
Security & Auth.quote: Claude finds what I'd find eventually. It just finds it faster.
Security & Auth.unmet_need: No skill for prompt injection detection or agent security posture review

Agent Orchestration.name: The Agentic Builder
Agent Orchestration.description: Was playing with LangChain before it was cool, abandoned it before it was abandoned. Building agent teams now. Deeply interested in how skills compose and how to avoid context collapse.
Agent Orchestration.uses_skills_for: Workflow orchestration, subagent coordination, context handoff between agents, MCP server construction
Agent Orchestration.quote: The hard part isn't the agent. It's keeping it from going off the rails at step 7.
Agent Orchestration.unmet_need: No skill for agent observability or failure mode detection

Data & Databases.name: The Analytics Engineer
Data & Databases.archetype: dbt practitioner at a data-forward company
Data & Databases.description: Thinks in DAGs. Cares about data quality, lineage, and making sure the numbers are right before they go in a dashboard. Uses Claude as a SQL pair programmer who never gets tired.
Data & Databases.uses_skills_for: Query optimization, schema design, dbt model generation, data quality checks
Data & Databases.quote: I don't trust SQL I didn't write. But I'll trust SQL Claude wrote if I review it.
Data & Databases.unmet_need: No skill for dbt-aware code review or data lineage traversal — DHK's territory

DevOps & Infrastructure.name: The Infrastructure Operator
DevOps & Infrastructure.archetype: Platform or SRE engineer at scale
DevOps & Infrastructure.description: Makes things not fall over. Operates at the intersection of speed and reliability. Uses Claude to reduce toil on the repetitive parts of infrastructure management.
DevOps & Infrastructure.uses_skills_for: Terraform scaffolding, deployment automation, CI/CD debugging, cloud cost review
DevOps & Infrastructure.quote: Toil is the enemy. If Claude can do it, Claude should do it.
DevOps & Infrastructure.unmet_need: No skill for incident retrospective generation or runbook automation

Document Creation.name: The Knowledge Worker
Document Creation.archetype: Operator or analyst at a mid-size company
Document Creation.description: Produces a lot of documents. Reports, decks, briefs, emails. Not a developer. Uses Claude to close the gap between what they know and what they can produce polished output of.
Document Creation.uses_skills_for: Word documents, Excel models, PowerPoint decks, PDF generation
Document Creation.quote: I know what I want to say. Claude helps me say it at scale.
Document Creation.unmet_need: No skill for document versioning, template management, or brand consistency checking across outputs

Testing & Debugging.name: The QA Practitioner
Testing & Debugging.archetype: Senior QA engineer or test automation lead
Testing & Debugging.description: Finds the edge cases everyone else misses. Uses Claude to scale test coverage and debug the weird stuff faster.
Testing & Debugging.uses_skills_for: Test generation, CI debugging, A/B test design and analysis, regression triage
Testing & Debugging.quote: Every bug is a test that didn't exist yet.
Testing & Debugging.unmet_need: No skill for test coverage gap analysis or flaky test pattern detection

Marketing & Content.name: The Growth Practitioner
Marketing & Content.archetype: Head of Growth or solo content operator
Marketing & Content.description: Moves fast, publishes constantly, measures everything. Uses Claude to increase publishing velocity without sacrificing voice.
Marketing & Content.uses_skills_for: SEO optimization, social content scheduling, AI search optimization, launch copy
Marketing & Content.quote: Distribution is the moat. Claude helps me show up everywhere.
Marketing & Content.unmet_need: No skill for brand voice consistency checking or content calendar management

Product Management.name: The Product Thinker
Product Management.archetype: Senior PM or founder with PM instincts
Product Management.description: Translates between customer pain and engineering reality. Uses Claude to accelerate the spec-to-ship cycle and think through decisions more rigorously.
Product Management.uses_skills_for: PRD generation, spec-to-implementation, hypothesis formation, pricing analysis, deprecation comms
Product Management.quote: The bottleneck is never the idea. It's always the spec.
Product Management.unmet_need: No skill for customer interview synthesis or opportunity sizing

Finance & Payments.name: The Fintech Builder
Finance & Payments.archetype: Engineer or PM at a payments or crypto company
Finance & Payments.description: Operates in regulated territory. Precision matters. Uses Claude for the technical parts of financial integrations while staying very close to the output.
Finance & Payments.uses_skills_for: Stripe integration, billing analytics, crypto contract auditing, payment flow design
Finance & Payments.quote: Money is where errors hurt most. Claude is useful here, carefully.
Finance & Payments.unmet_need: No skill for regulatory compliance checking or audit trail generation

Communication.name: The Internal Communicator
Communication.archetype: Chief of Staff, Ops Lead, or team lead at a scaling company
Communication.description: Keeps the organization aligned. Writes a lot of internal documents nobody reads and a few that everyone needs to. Uses Claude to make the communication layer less of a bottleneck.
Communication.uses_skills_for: Status reports, alert routing, email drafting, multi-channel notification setup
Communication.quote: The work is fine. It's the communication about the work that kills us.
Communication.unmet_need: No skill for meeting synthesis, async update generation, or stakeholder communication cadence management

Media & Creative.name: The Creative Technologist
Media & Creative.archetype: Creative director with engineering chops, or engineer with creative instincts
Media & Creative.description: Lives at the intersection of art and code. Uses Claude for generative work — art, video, music, 3D — and to accelerate the production pipeline.
Media & Creative.uses_skills_for: Generative art, image synthesis, video production, podcast generation, 3D model creation
Media & Creative.quote: The best creative tools disappear. Claude is getting close.
Media & Creative.unmet_need: No skill for creative brief synthesis or multi-modal production pipeline management
